dataList.dlg:
Hup! *sigh* Every bleedin' joint's stiff somethin' awful today...
Wha? Your back givin' out, footstool? Ain't that rich? Well, then why'd you go narkin' us if you knew what was comin', eh?

Got business breathing down my neck this mornin', lads, so don't wait up and sort yourselves somethin' decent for breakfast 'fore you get movin', yeah? Here, my card's yours—dish out a warm welcome for our fresh little siblings—the blonde lass and that big slab o' muscle.
Oi, Sinclair, I'm leavin' the reins to you. You've knocked about the East a fair bit, ain't that right? I'm countin' on ya to look after 'em.

Ain't much of an early riser, eh? What kinda businessman opens their store at noon? I've been waitin' for your tardy arse all morning...
Hah... You wanna know why I'm here? You're behind on this month's protection fee, mate. C'mon, don't get yourself written up in the Book for a few coins, yeah?

Hm... a roast duck spot, eh? Sounds good. Make sure to order a hefty truckload, I'll be right there 'soon as I'm done here. Y'know the texture I fancy, yeah? The luscious, melt-in-the-mouth ones.
Hmm... Right, then. Which hair salon 'round these parts got hands steady enough to recreate the subtleties of my hairdo?

Got that, lads? It's "Moelleux," not "Modèles"—though they're right next to each other. Now don't go crashin' into Modèles and cause a scene askin' for haircuts in an art academy, yeah? I'll pay for the whole lot, so just walk into Moelleux, ask to get your hair done, and get a loyalty coupon stamped for me. You lot better become regulars there once we're back South, yeah?

Oh yeah, give your Great Bro my thanks again. Be sure to tell the guv he can expect a private dinin' experience at that flattop grill he liked, 'cuz I'll be renting the place out whole if he visits us in the south again.
They say a little help between family ain't a thing, but that help don't come cheap, does it? 'Course I'll pay 'im back in kind.

See the difference? "Luscious" and "luxuriant" hair might sound like they're both describin' the same thing, but that ain't true. Get it through your head: a thick slather o' gel ain't gonna cut it if you're chasin' that "Luxuriant hair."
And don't get me started on "bristly" and "bushy". I'll grant a bit of mercy for "bushy"—maybe I'll lop off an arm and call it even—but if some fool turns my hair bristly, I... *sigh* I even went to the elder Brothers, askin' if I could stretch the book to include "execution."

... Ah, found you. Thought you were off the hook, did you, coupon thief? You've got some nerve, making me trek all the way to the eastern part of the City just to deal with you... That's bloody disrespectful, innit? Every time I run my fingers through my hair, I feel it slidin' into the world of the bristly, strand by strand, day by day... Don't reckon you'll mind if I add a dozen more lines next to your name in the Book, will ya?!

Title 8, Section 20... Row A... Line 6. The thief and all of their affiliates—complete and total extermination, effective immediately. Compounded with leggin' it from the punishment, and ropin' in that crusty old fisherman... Cost me an arm, y'know. Oi, tell me somethin'. How many times d'you reckon I'll have to kill you to cross out every single Vengeance listed under your names, assumin' you can come back?

... Oi, footstool, quit the shakin', will ya? This right here's a holy and sacred ritual of me fixin' up my hair proper. One strand outta place, and I'm gonna crack your skull open like an egg, got it?

Memories are important, so remember this before you cough up the last breath you ain't keeping. Name's Heathcliff, a Big Brother of the Middle... the name of the one what's gonna exterminate the whole bloody lot o' you bastards!
Yeah? ... Found 'em, eh?
Right then. Carryin' out the Vengeance, sharpish.
Hmm... What d'you reckon? Looks more luscious now, don't it?
Get ready, here comes Big Bro!
Out cold, are we? All right—one line crossed off the Book.
Tch... *spit*
Oi, get up! You've still got 11 deaths left in you!
Gah... even if I drop... Great Brother's Vengeance'll find you...!
Oh? Well, look at that. Not bad. Here, you earned a "good-job" kitty sticker for your Book.
... You takin' the piss outta me? You should've brought somethin' that actually bloody works!

That ain't near enough to make it even... Oh? Look at that—still a whole list left to scratch out. Brilliant. Run along then, ya wankers. Scurry off and lick your wounds, 'cuz by the time I return, there'll be enough pain to go around for the whole gang.

Finally...! Finally back in my hands where you belong, my lovely little special hair coupons! After tryin' and failin' to recreate that style on my own for so long... it's so bloody lovely to see you! Reckon now I can stretch out and get some decent shut-eye in the world of the luscious.
Pack it up, lads! We're callin' it! Drinks are on your Big Bro tonight—keep 'em coming!

... Cut the music. *fume* Hah... Breathe, me... Fine, they got us this time. But this ain't the end of it—still got pages full o' Vengeances to settle with that lot. 'Least we'll get to go after those tossers again and again 'till we're satisfied. Let's make it a proper game next time, yeah?
